sections.paragraph:
Original: אצבּן אצבּון

Transliteration: 'etsbôn 'etsbôn

Phonetic: ets-bone'

BDB Definition:

Ezbon = "hasting to discern: I will be enlargement"
  1. a son of Gad
  2. grandson of Benjamin

Origin: of uncertain derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
